items.text: Over 80% of people search online before making a purchase. If you're not there, your competitor is.

steps.title: Agreement
steps.text: We start with a clear conversation about what you need. Then I write it down — a simple agreement that defines exactly what you're getting, when, and for how much. No hidden costs, no surprises. You know what you're paying for before we begin.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: I create a design that fits your brand and your audience. You see it before a single line of code is written. Your feedback shapes the final look.

steps.title: Build
steps.text: I build your site with clean, modern code. Fast loading, mobile responsive, SEO ready. You get progress updates throughout — no radio silence.

steps.title: Launch
steps.text: Your site goes live. I handle hosting, domain setup, and make sure everything works perfectly. Then I stick around — because delivery isn't disappearing.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.for: For freelancers, photographers, and craftsmen who need a professional online presence.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.for: For small businesses, salons, restaurants, and coaches ready to level up.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.for: For businesses that want to stand out and have full control.

extras.title: What Affects the Price
items: Additional pages beyond tier limit (on request)

pricing.scope: Every project starts with a clear written agreement — you know exactly what's included before we begin. The price covers everything defined upfront. Changes outside the original scope are charged separately — fair to you, fair to me. Revisions mean small adjustments, not changing direction entirely.

plans.name: Content Refresh
plans.description: Update texts, images, phone numbers, or prices. Includes checking that all changes display correctly on mobile and tablet.
plans.for: Quick fixes to keep your info current without changing the design.

plans.name: Redesign & Upgrade
plans.description: Update colors, fonts, and layout. Full mobile optimization for the latest devices — everything responsive, clean, and easy to tap.
plans.for: Give your old site a modern look that works perfectly on every screen.

plans.name: Standard
plans.description: Better performance, monthly backup, priority support

plans.name: Premium
plans.description: Fast hosting, daily backups, 24h response time

plans.name: Full Care
plans.description: Everything + up to 3h changes, monthly report

calculator.title: Estimate Your Project

labels.pagesHint: How many separate pages your site will have (e.g. Home, About, Contact)
labels.galleryHint: A section to showcase your photos or work in a visual grid
labels.contactFormHint: A form where visitors can send you messages directly from the site
labels.mapsHint: An interactive map on your site showing your business location
labels.whatsappHint: A button visitors can tap to message you directly on WhatsApp
labels.blogHint: A section where you can publish articles, tips, or updates
labels.cmsHint: You'll be able to edit texts, images, and posts yourself — no developer needed
labels.logoHint: A custom logo created for your brand from scratch
labels.rushHint: Need it faster than the standard timeline? Priority production (+30%)
labels.hostingHint: Where your website lives on the internet — I handle all the technical setup
labels.maintenanceHint: Ongoing care: updates, backups, and small changes handled for you

items.question: What do I need to provide to get started?
items.answer: Not much. A rough idea of what you want, any text or images you'd like on the site, and access to your domain if you have one. Don't worry if you're not sure about details — that's literally my job to figure out.

items.question: How long does it take to build my site?
items.answer: Basic sites take 3–5 days. Standard ones about a week. Larger projects 10–14 days. These timelines start after we agree on everything and I have your content. I'll give you an exact timeline before we start.

items.question: Can I edit the site myself after delivery?
items.answer: If you go with the Pro tier, absolutely — it comes with a CMS that lets you update text, images, and blog posts yourself. For Basic and Standard, I handle changes for you, either included in your revision rounds or through a maintenance package.

items.question: What is hosting and do you handle it?
items.answer: Hosting is where your website lives on the internet — think of it as renting space for your site. Yes, I handle everything: setup, SSL certificates, renewals. You don't need to think about it. I offer three hosting packages depending on your needs.

items.question: What if I don't like the design?
items.answer: You see the design before I write any code. We discuss it, you give feedback, and I adjust. That's what the revision rounds are for. I've never had a client unhappy with the final result because we communicate throughout the process.

items.question: What are revisions and how many do I get?
items.answer: Revisions are adjustments after you see the result — changing a color, moving a section, swapping an image. Basic includes 1 round, Standard and Pro include 2. A revision round is not a redesign — it's fine-tuning. Extra rounds are €30–50 each.

items.question: What happens if I want changes after the site is delivered?
items.answer: Small things? Message me, I'll usually sort it out quickly. Ongoing changes? That's what the maintenance packages are for. Completely new features or sections? We scope it like a mini-project with a clear price upfront.

items.question: Do you handle domain registration?
items.answer: I can guide you through buying a domain or do it on your behalf. The domain is always yours — I never hold a client's domain hostage. Annual domain cost is separate from my pricing (usually €10–15/year for .com).

items.question: Can I get an invoice?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely. I provide a proper invoice for every project. Everything clean and official.

items.question: How do we start working together?
items.answer: Simple. Message me on WhatsApp or fill out the contact form. Tell me roughly what you need. I'll get back to you within 24 hours with questions or a quote. No commitment until we both agree on the scope and price in writing.

items.quote: Milos built the website for my weight loss program exactly how I envisioned it. Professional, fast, and he understood the medical side without me having to explain everything twice. The site brings in new patients every week.
items.name: Prof. Dr. Bojko Bjelaković

items.quote: We needed a door configurator that shows customers exactly what they're ordering — in real time. Milos understood the technical challenge immediately and delivered something our competitors don't have. It cut our order errors in half.
items.name: Milivoje Ristić

items.quote: What convinced me was the clear agreement before starting. I knew exactly what I was paying for. No other freelancer I talked to offered that kind of transparency. The site itself is exactly what my business needed.
items.name: Jelena S.

about.title: Who's Behind This
about.text: I'm Milos — I started building websites because I saw how many small businesses had no proper online presence, and how simple it can be to change that. I work fast, communicate clearly, and I don't disappear after delivery. Every project gets the same attention whether it's a one-page portfolio or a full business site. I believe in fair pricing, honest timelines, and doing exactly what I said I would do.

hero.name: Marija Miletić
hero.title: Digital Marketing
hero.headline: Your brand deserves to be
hero.subline: Social media management, content creation, and digital marketing education — all in one place.

items.title: Social Media Management
items.description: I take over your social media so you can focus on your business. Content planning, posting schedule, audience engagement — all handled professionally and consistently.

items.title: Content Creation
items.description: Scroll-stopping visuals and copy that speaks to your audience. From Instagram posts to stories and reels — content that builds your brand and drives engagement.

items.title: Visual Design
items.description: Professional graphics for your brand using Canva and modern design tools. Social media templates, brand kits, presentations, and marketing materials that look polished.

items.title: Digital Marketing Education
items.description: Learn to manage your own digital presence. One-on-one mentoring, workshops, and practical training on social media strategy, content creation, and online marketing basics.

items.title: Marketing Strategy
items.description: A clear roadmap for your online presence. I analyze your audience, competitors, and goals to create a strategy that actually works — not just theory, but actionable steps.

items.title: Facebook & Instagram Advertising
items.description: Targeted ad campaigns that reach the right people. From setup to optimization — I make sure your ad budget works hard and delivers real results.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.text: We talk about your brand, goals, and audience. I learn what makes your business unique and where you want to go.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.text: I build a tailored plan — content calendar, tone of voice, platform focus. You see the plan before anything goes live.

steps.title: Execution
steps.text: Content gets created, scheduled, and published. I handle engagement, monitor performance, and adjust as needed.

steps.title: Growth
steps.text: Monthly reports show what's working. We refine the strategy together and keep building your presence.

items.question: What platforms do you work with?
items.answer: Primarily Instagram and Facebook, as they're the most effective for small businesses. I can also help with LinkedIn, TikTok, and Google Business Profile depending on your needs.

items.question: How much does social media management cost?
items.answer: It depends on the scope — how many platforms, how many posts per week, whether you need ad management too. Let's talk about your needs and I'll give you a clear price.

items.question: Can I see results before committing long-term?
items.answer: Absolutely. We can start with a one-month trial so you see exactly what you're getting. No long-term contracts required upfront.

items.question: Do you create the visuals too?
items.answer: Yes. I design all graphics, write the copy, and handle the entire content production process. You just approve and I publish.

items.question: How often will you post?
items.answer: Typically 3-5 times per week depending on the platform and your package. Quality over quantity — every post has a purpose.

items.question: What if I want to learn to do it myself?
items.answer: That's exactly what my education service is for. I'll teach you the strategy, tools, and techniques through practical one-on-one sessions. You'll be independent in weeks.

items.quote: Marija completely transformed our Instagram. We went from random posts to a real strategy, and the difference in engagement was visible within the first month.
items.name: Ivana R.

items.quote: I had no idea where to start with social media for my business. Marija made it simple, taught me the basics, and now I actually enjoy posting.
items.name: Stefan P.

items.quote: Professional, creative, and always on time. She treats my brand like it's her own. Couldn't ask for more.
items.name: Milica D.

about.title: About Me
about.text: I'm Marija — a digital marketing specialist based in Belgrade with years of experience helping businesses build their online presence. I believe every brand has a story worth telling, and my job is to make sure the right people hear it. I combine strategy with creativity — whether it's managing your social media, creating content that connects, or teaching you how to do it yourself. I've worked with small businesses, entrepreneurs, and organizations, and I bring the same energy and attention to every project.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.text: Have a project in mind or want to learn more about what I can do for your brand? Reach out — I'd love to hear from you.
